# Daily Pick – Team Rituals for Stand-ups & Planning

> Lightweight web experiences that make remote stand-ups, retrospectives, and sprint planning quick, fair, and engaging for distributed teams.

## Core Tools & Games

- [Planning Poker](https://dailypick.dev/apps/planning-poker): Multiplayer Fibonacci voting for sprint estimation with real-time reveal, vote summaries, and Jira/Trello export.
- [Wheel of Names](https://dailypick.dev/apps/wheel): Visual spinner for fair selection and decision-making during meetings.
- [Retro Board](https://dailypick.dev/apps/retro-board): Shared retrospective tool for team feedback (went well, didn't go well, action items).
- [Timer](https://dailypick.dev/apps/timer): Meeting timekeeper with visual countdown.
- [Morale Thermometer](https://dailypick.dev/apps/morale-thermometer): Quick team pulse check during standups.
- [Team Alignment Games](https://dailypick.dev/apps/): Ball Game, Mimic Master, Gravity Drift, Speedway, Trap, Letters, and more for engagement and quick team bonding.

## Technical Stack

- Built with Eleventy (11ty) static site generator + Cloudflare Workers serverless runtime
- Durable Objects for real-time multiplayer sessions (Planning Poker, Mimic Master, Ball Game, Retro Board)
- Client-side performance focus; no mandatory server-side data storage
- Privacy-first architecture; suitable for enterprise teams

## Blog & Documentation

Comprehensive guides on agile ceremonies, team rituals, and productivity at [https://dailypick.dev/blog](https://dailypick.dev/blog).

## GitHub & Deployment

- Source: https://github.com/Dimakoua/dailypick
- Deployed on Cloudflare (https://dailypick.dev)
